     repros this issue
       [2026-03-17T04:11:59.665699+00:00] [sig_ts:1773720719612]
     [DM:c7a32065-3a75-4835-bdab-50ac04dba932] GB (sent): On it -- launching agent to
     create an e2e test that captures the actual tmux pane output during thinking and
     verifies detection.
       [2026-03-17T04:13:25.704302+00:00] [sig_ts:1773720805559] Andrew Hall (he/him):
     your agent might not realize that you ARENT thinking while its checking. "Baked for"
     is you idling

● Good point from Andrew — the agent might capture the pane while I'm idle, not thinking. Let
  me pass that context to the agent.

● Can't send messages to running agents. The agent will have to figure it out from context — it
   should notice "Baked for" in the tmux capture and check journalctl logs for actual thinking
  captures. Andrew's point is valid but the agent's prompt already asks it to capture different
   states and check logs.

  Standing by for agent completion.
